rationale: The single ground-truth concern (yJader's inline comment) is actually a defense of the fix: both submit_initial and submit_update reject list prompts, so dropping the already_submitted gate is correct and desirable. X nails this precisely, citing stage_pool.py:951/1022, and reaches APPROVE matching the real outcome (two LGTMs). Y's own 'sweep' note reaches the same conclusion internally, but then repeatedly re-flags the identical orchestrator.py:1290 line as [major]/[minor] asking to 'confirm' something it already validated, inflating severity and contradicting itself, and lands on REQUEST CHANGES — directly at odds with the actual reviewer consensus. Y's redundant near-duplicate comments on one line also hurt precision and signal quality despite superficially concrete line citations.
